VOYAGE/TCT OK
MV RUBY - BELAWAN 10-15 DEC
SID/BC - MALTA FLAG/BLT 2012
OHBS/BOX
37039 MT DWT ON 10.91M SSW
TPC on SSW: 46.63mt
LOA182.82/BEAM 27.80
45648 GR / 45151 BALE
5HO/5HA - 4 X 36T CRANES
at sea: laden abt 12.50 knots on abt 23.00 mt(ifo380) + 0.10 mt mdo & ballast abt 13.00 knots on abt 23.00 mt(ifo380) + 0.10 mt mdo vsl\'s speed consumption based on good
weather/calm sea max beaufort 4 / douglas sea state 3 and no adverse currents/swell/weather
in port idle with Bolier abt 3.0mt(ifo380) + 0.10 mt mdo - working with bolier abt 4.00 mt(ifo380) + 0.10 mt mdo FO 380CST -WITHIN ISO 8217:2020 RMG380
